title: [do not merge] add swap to CI for 1.29

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *nalind* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.29/OWNERS)~~ [nalind] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Flaking _a lot_ in a way that's reminiscent of when we needed the change from https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2339.
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
